titleStmt.title: SII 9.105: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 105. (A.R. No. 711 of 1919.) ON A BOULDER CALLED BACHE-GUNDU NEAR THE ANJANEYA TEMPLE AT KANCHAGARA-BELAGALLU, ALUR TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 969, Sarvajit, Vaiśākha, amāvāsye, Śukravāra, Sūrya-grahaṇa. The date is not quite regular. It the month is taken as Pūrṇimānta the date corresponds to A.D. 1047 March 29, Sunday (not Friday as stated) when there was a solar eclipse. The record refers itself to the reign of the Chālukya king Traiḷōkyamalladēva and records that the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Gaṇḍarādityarasa, who was ruling over Sindavāḍi thousand, Beṇṇevūr twelve and Naṟugunda, made a gift of 6 mattars of land for the service of the god Vishṇudēva in Kaṁchagāṟa-Beḻgali.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja
paramēśvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḻatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābha
raṇaṁ śrītraiḷōkyamalladēvara vijayarājyābhivriddhipravarddhamā
namācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire samadhigatapañcamahāsabda
mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ māhiṣmatīpuravarēsvaraṁ madhyadēśādhipa
ti birudaragaṇḍa nāḷimmunniṟivaniṟivarttigaṇḍaṁ maṇḍalagāvanēka
vākyaṁ nāmādisamastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ
gaṇḍarādityarasar sindavāḍi sāsiramuṁ beṇnevūr panneraḍumaṁ tamma bhattagrāme naṟugundamu
maṁ sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttire sakhavarṣa 969 neya sarvvajitsaṁvatsarada vaisākhadamā
vāsya sukravāra sūryyagrahaṇadandu kaṁcagāṟabeḻgaliya nāgaṇnōjara viṣṇudēvargge
biṭṭa piriyakōla kariyamatta 6 sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasētu
rnripāṇāṁ kālē kālē pā
lanīyō bhavadbhiḥ sarvvānētān
bhāginaḥ pārttivēṁdrānbhū
yō bhūyō yācatē rāma
bhadraḥ svadattaṁ paradattaṅvā
yō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭi
rvvariṣasahasrāṇi vi
ṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 9.105 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
